title: Implement Wave 38 manager provider handoff fit UI
description: Render additive provider fit preview and recommendation states inside the manager handoff flow while preserving directory/profile selection context and current assignment actions.
acceptance_criteria: Manager handoff candidate cards render additive fit preview, recommendation badge, and supporting reasons when available
Selection context coming from provider directory/profile remains deterministic when returning to handoff
Existing handoff assignment actions continue to work without regression when new candidate metadata is absent
